description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a rough, matte surface and a visible brown stem on top. The pumpkin has a traditional jack-o'-lantern face carved into one side, featuring two triangular eyes and a jagged mouth with a missing tooth, giving it a slightly mischievous expression. The carving is geometric and simple, with sharp, angular cutouts. The pumpkin's body is slightly irregular and faceted, with visible ridges and a somewhat flattened base. The stem is short, thick, and textured, appearing to be made of wood. There are no additional decorative accessories or embellishments present.
description: A medium orange pumpkin with a brown stem and a traditional jack-o'-lantern face carved into one side, featuring triangular eyes and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, as well as the brown stem on top.
description_view_1: The back view displays the uncarved, faceted surface of the pumpkin and the stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the pumpkin's rounded, ridged body and the stem, with no carvings visible.
description_view_3: The angled view reveals part of the carved face, showing the mouth and one eye, along with the stem and the pumpkin's textured surface.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes and a jagged, angular mouth; geometric style with sharp cutouts.
